name: Flavored Mustards
recipeInstructions:
Create your own flavored mustard
- Lemon mustard: Stir 1 teaspoon grated lemon rind and 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice into 1/2 cup Dijon mustard.
- Green peppercorn mustard: Mix 1 tablespoon freshly ground green peppercorns and 1 minced shallot into 1/2 cup Dijon mustard.
- Honey mustard: Combine equal parts honey and mustard, whisk until smooth. Use this to perk up ham and pork.
- Chili mustard: Combine 2 tablespoons diced, pickled jalapeno chilies with 1/2 cup Dijon mustard for a sizzle in Southwestern dishes.
- Horseradish mustard: Combine 1 tablespoon grated horseradish, a dash of Tabasco, and 2 tablespoons nonfat mayo with 1/2 cup Dijon mustard for a palate-dazzling dip.
